template_issue.title: web-capture#139 — Check for all false positives and errors in CI/CD and fix them all
template_issue.used_for: Source of the standard remediation prompt reproduced by buildStandardPrompt(); defines the 'compare full file tree, report upstream template issues, compile case study to docs/case-studies/issue-{id}, single PR' instructions.

data_files.description: The issue itself (title, body, state, no comments at capture).
Issue comments — empty array at capture time.
Byte-weighted language breakdown used for template ordering.
Recent CI/CD workflow runs on the default branch (used to validate the branch fallback).

online_sources.title: List repository languages — GitHub REST API
online_sources.used_for: Authoritative byte-per-language map (server-side GitHub Linguist) that drives detectLanguages() and the template ordering.

online_sources.title: List workflow runs for a repository — GitHub REST API (Actions)
online_sources.used_for: head_sha and branch query parameters, and the run fields (name/status/conclusion/html_url/head_sha) listed in the generated issue.

online_sources.title: GitHub Linguist
online_sources.used_for: Explains how GitHub computes the byte-weighted language breakdown that the /languages endpoint returns.

online_sources.title: linguist-js (npm)
online_sources.used_for: Considered as an offline language-detection fallback; not used because the /languages API is authoritative and already available via gh.

online_sources.title: dacbd/create-issue-action (GitHub Action)
online_sources.used_for: Prior art for auto-creating an issue from a failed CI run; /fix differs by detecting languages and delegating the fix to /solve --auto-merge.

online_sources.title: Create an issue when a GitHub Actions workflow fails (GitHub Docs / IssueOps)
online_sources.used_for: Background on issue-driven automation (IssueOps) patterns informing the issue-first design of /fix.

online_sources.title: OpenAI Codex — automatically fixing CI failures (cookbook)
online_sources.used_for: Prior art for AI-agent-driven CI remediation; /fix reuses the same idea but routes through hive-mind's /solve agent loop.

online_sources.title: php-ai-driven-development-pipeline-template (link-foundation)
online_sources.used_for: The PHP CI/CD template added to CI_CD_TEMPLATES and to docs/CI-CD-BEST-PRACTICES.md per the issue; verified its tooling (PHP CS Fixer, PHPStan, PHPUnit, changelog.d) for the documentation rows.

online_sources.title: Changesets
online_sources.used_for: Versioning mechanism; a changeset is added in this PR to trigger the release that ships the /fix command.
